metadata.title: Style Settings
metadata.description: Offers controls for adjusting theme, plugin, and snippet CSS variables.

regex.source: .setDesc('Import an entire or partial configuration. Warning: this may override existing settings')
regex.target: .setDesc('导入整个或部分配置。警告：这可能会覆盖现有设置')

regex.source: text: 'Click here for details and examples.'
regex.target: text: '点击此处查看详细信息和示例。'

regex.source: .setText("Error importing style settings: config is empty")
regex.target: .setText("导入样式设置错误: 配置为空")

regex.source: .appendText("Style settings configured by theme and plugin authors will show up here. You can also create your own configuration by creating a CSS snippet in your vault. ")
regex.target: .appendText("由主题和插件作者配置的样式设置将显示在这里。您也可以通过在您的仓库中创建 CSS 片段来创建自己的配置。")

regex.source: text:"Click here for details and examples."

regex.target: Error("函数 yaml."+e+" 在 js-yaml 4 中已被移除。请改用 yaml."+n+"，现在默认是安全的。")
